candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line with populated values; best match for top-line sales.
Also represents total business revenue and matches the same values; good fallback if primary label is missing in some years.
Generic revenue header/label, but appears unpopulated in preview and is less precise than the two explicit revenue lines.

variables.notes: Selected as priority list for revenue label changes over time; do not sum.

candidates.why: Best direct total cost-of-sales line aligned to revenues; preferred over underlying components for COGS.
Only a partial/unclassified component, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: A component of cost of revenues, not the full COGS line.
Only one component of production costs.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only one component of cost of revenues.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement COGS.

variables.notes: CR:nc|low. Used the direct operating cost line rather than summing components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related row from candidates, but it excludes R&D by definition and therefore is less suitable than the full SG&A line when a full explicit SG&A row exists.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but component rows should not be used when an explicit populated SG&A row exists.
Only a small residual component, not full SG&A.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.
R&D line exists, but should not replace explicit SG&A; likely already embedded in SG&A total here.

variables.notes: OK. Candidate list missed the best explicit SG&A row. Per rules, selected outside candidate list from the A-column preview: 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. This populated explicit SG&A line is preferable to components/subtotals and appears to include R&D because SG&A total exceeds 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses' by the same amount as the reported R&D supplemental line in 2025–2024. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; best available match.
Section/header style label, less precise than the explicit expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: An SG&A row excluding R&D, not R&D itself.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below EBIT in a supplemental section, but it is still the clearest R&D expense label. SG&A selection likely already embeds R&D, so this supports the intended XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD treatment.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct recurring interest expense line; excludes capitalized portion and avoids non-interest finance items.
Also a clean recurring interest expense label with matching values; useful fallback if labeling changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost but likely a component of total interest expense; selecting it alongside total interest would risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Gross interest before subtracting capitalized interest; less preferred than net-of-capitalized line.
Contra/adjustment item, not standalone expense to add by itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list only; do not sum. Avoided net finance total because granular recurring interest lines exist, and excluded lease-interest component to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes minority interest and is attributable to parent shareholders.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-only equity concept; strong fallback if primary label changes.
Also appears to represent parent/common equity only; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when MIB is separately mapped.
This is MIB, not BE.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent/common equity labels to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest equity line on the balance sheet; best match for MIB.
Income statement allocation item, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income allocation, not minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes MIB within a total equity number, not a standalone minority interest line.

variables.notes: Selected standalone balance-sheet minority interest line so BE + MIB can be formed without double counting.
